tasks.build: deno task clean && deno run -A npm:typescript@5.9.3/tsc -b packages/core packages/transport-tcp packages/transport-quic packages/transport-websocket packages/native-client packages/native-server packages/browser-client
tasks.package-check: deno run --allow-read scripts/check-package-entrypoints.ts && deno run --allow-read scripts/check-package-contents.ts && deno task node-import-smoke && deno task package-pack && deno task public-api && deno task browser-bundle-smoke
tasks.package-smoke: deno task build && deno task package-check
tasks.release-dry-run: deno task package-smoke && deno run --allow-read --allow-write=artifacts/release-dry-run --allow-env=ComSpec,NNRP_JS_FORCE_NPM_PACK --allow-run=deno,npm,cmd scripts/create-release-dry-run-artifacts.ts artifacts/release-dry-run
tasks.publish:dry-run: deno task build && deno run --allow-read --allow-write=artifacts/npm-publish --allow-env=ComSpec --allow-run=npm,cmd scripts/publish-packages.ts --dry-run
tasks.publish: deno task build && deno run --allow-read --allow-write=artifacts/npm-publish --allow-env=ComSpec --allow-run=npm,cmd scripts/publish-packages.ts
tasks.lint: deno fmt --check && deno lint && deno task runtime-policy && deno task todo:check && deno task api-consistency && deno task typecheck
tasks.typecheck: deno check packages/*/src/index.ts packages/*/test/*.test.ts scripts/*.ts examples/*.ts
